summary: Phase 12 Backend Testing Complete - All care plan routes migrated from server.py to routes/care_plans.py are working correctly. 67/67 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Birth Plan CRUD routes properly migrated - GET /api/birth-plan, PUT /api/birth-plan/section/{section_id} working correctly
Birth Plan Export routes properly migrated - GET /api/birth-plan/export (JSON), GET /api/birth-plan/export/pdf (PDF generation with reportlab)
Provider Search route properly migrated - GET /api/providers/search?query=xxx with name/email/location matching
Birth Plan Sharing (Mom) routes properly migrated - POST/GET/DELETE /api/birth-plan/share working correctly
Provider Share Requests routes properly migrated - GET /api/provider/share-requests, PUT /api/provider/share-requests/{id}/respond
Provider Birth Plan Access routes properly migrated - GET /api/provider/shared-birth-plans, GET /api/provider/shared-birth-plan/{mom_id}, GET /api/provider/client/{mom_id}/birth-plan
Provider Birth Plan Notes routes properly migrated - POST/PUT/DELETE /api/provider/birth-plan/{mom_id}/notes with full CRUD
Wellness routes properly migrated - POST/GET /api/wellness/checkin, POST/GET /api/wellness/entry, GET /api/wellness/stats
Postpartum routes properly migrated - GET/PUT /api/postpartum/plan with upsert functionality
Timeline routes properly migrated - GET/POST/DELETE /api/timeline with pregnancy milestones
Role-based access control verified - Mom-only routes (birth plan, wellness, postpartum, timeline) correctly block Doula/Midwife
Role-based access control verified - Provider-only routes (share-requests, shared-birth-plans) correctly block Mom
No MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors - all responses properly exclude _id field
All 404 error handling works correctly for nonexistent resources
All 403 error handling works correctly for unauthorized access
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed wellness entries, timeline events, and birth plan section data during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 backend refactoring complete. All care plan routes have been migrated from monolithic server.py to routes/care_plans.py (~1179 lines). This includes: Birth Plan CRUD and export (with PDF generation using reportlab), Provider Search, Birth Plan Sharing, Provider Share Requests, Provider Birth Plan Access/Notes, Wellness Check-ins/Entries/Stats, Postpartum Plan, Timeline with Milestones. All endpoints verified with 67 passing tests covering CRUD operations, role-based access control, and ObjectId serialization.

endpoints: GET /api/birth-plan - Get mom's birth plan (creates default if not exists)
PUT /api/birth-plan/section/{section_id} - Update birth plan section data
GET /api/birth-plan/export - Get birth plan data for export (JSON)
GET /api/birth-plan/export/pdf - Generate downloadable PDF with reportlab
GET /api/providers/search?query=xxx - Search doulas/midwives by name, email, or location
POST /api/birth-plan/share - Share birth plan with provider
GET /api/birth-plan/share-requests - Get mom's share requests
DELETE /api/birth-plan/share/{id} - Revoke share access
GET /api/provider/share-requests - Get share requests for provider
PUT /api/provider/share-requests/{id}/respond - Accept or reject share request
GET /api/provider/shared-birth-plans - Get all birth plans shared with provider
GET /api/provider/shared-birth-plan/{mom_id} - Get specific shared birth plan
GET /api/provider/client/{mom_id}/birth-plan - Get client's birth plan
POST /api/provider/birth-plan/{mom_id}/notes - Add note to birth plan section
PUT /api/provider/birth-plan-notes/{note_id} - Update provider note
DELETE /api/provider/birth-plan-notes/{note_id} - Delete provider note
POST /api/wellness/checkin - Create wellness check-in (mood)
GET /api/wellness/checkins - Get check-in history
POST /api/wellness/entry - Create detailed wellness entry (mood, energy, sleep, symptoms, journal)
GET /api/wellness/entries - Get entry history
GET /api/wellness/stats - Get wellness statistics for past N days
GET /api/postpartum/plan - Get postpartum plan
PUT /api/postpartum/plan - Update postpartum plan (upsert)
GET /api/timeline - Get pregnancy timeline with milestones
POST /api/timeline/events - Create custom timeline event
DELETE /api/timeline/events/{id} - Delete timeline event

objectid_serialization.note: All care plan responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field - no serialization errors

mocked_apis.note: Care plan routes use real database queries. All CRUD operations tested against live MongoDB.

categories: Provider Birth Plan Access and Notes
